header_title.description: App din a wɔda header no so. App a ɛboa ma wuhu aduane a wɔyɛ wɔ wiase mfinimfini.

header_subtitle.text: Hu aduane a ɛfiri wiase mfinimfini
header_subtitle.description: Tagline a ɛda app din ase wɔ header no mu.

home_page_hero_title.description: Titiriw asɛm a ɛda home page hero fa no so.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Hwɛ aduane a ɛyɛ nokware fi wiase mfinimfini aduane fie mu
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Subtitle asɛm a ɛda hero titiriw no ase wɔ home page no so.

home_page_featured_title.description: Fael a ɛda nnuane krataa no atifi wɔ grid no so.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Bere a wode yɛ aduane no kyerɛ wɔ nnuane krataa so. {minutes} yɛ bere a ɛda ho no.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Label a ɛda nnuane krataa so ansa na wɔbɛka ɔhaw no ho.

recipe_card_easy.description: Nyaatwom a ɛkyerɛ sɛ aduane no yɛ mmerɛ.

recipe_card_medium.description: Nyaatwom a ɛkyerɛ sɛ aduane no yɛ mfinimfini wɔ ɔhaw mu.

recipe_card_hard.description: Nyaatwom a ɛkyerɛ sɛ aduane no yɛ den.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Nnuane a wɔde pork bone broth a ɛyɛ dɛ paa, chashu a ɛyɛ tender, kosua a wɔaboa mu, ne noodles foforo.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Neapolitan pizza a ɛyɛ klasik, a wɔde San Marzano tomati, mozzarella foforo, ne basil.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Tacos al Pastor aduane no din.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Pork tacos a wɔde marinade, pineapple, cilantro, ne onion gu so wɔ corn tortillas so.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Tacos al Pastor aduane no nkyerɛase.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Akokɔ a ɛyɛ tender wɔ tomato ne butter sauce a ɛyɛ creamy mu, a wɔde nnuane a ɛwɔ hɔ.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Rice noodles a wɔakɔtɔ mu ne shrimp, tofu, peanuts, ne tamarind sauce.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes a ɛyɛ hare na ɛyɛ fɛfɛɛfɛ a wɔde Nutella, strawberries foforo, ne whipped cream hyɛ mu.

locale_switcher_label.description: Kasa a wɔde bɛsesaa kasa no wɔ header no mu.

locale_switcher_en.description: Borɔfo kasa a wɔde yɛ locale switcher no mu.

locale_switcher_ja.description: Japan kasa a wɔde yɛ locale switcher no mu.

locale_switcher_es.description: Spanish kasa a wɔde yɛ locale switcher no mu.
